title: Seatline NYC
description: Choose a New York theater, showtime, and seat, then preview the 3D screen angle and sightline before opening the venue’s live listing.

prompt.objective: Build a New York cinema seat-preview experience with measured 3D sightlines.

mintAssets.brief: Auditorium shells, projection screens, recliners, and aisle fixtures.
Original mythic sea poster art for the fictional feature.

experience: Choose a venue, showtime, and seat, then move into its seated camera.
Read sightline metrics and open a non-binding summary before the venue listing.
prompt.visualDirection: Brass and charcoal cinema styling with warm oxblood seating and restrained technical overlays.

thumbnail.alt: Seatline NYC showing a selected seat beside the 3D auditorium sightline and booking controls.

social.title: Seatline NYC
social.description: Preview a New York theater seat and its measured 3D screen sightline before booking.

image.alt: Seatline NYC showing a selected seat beside the 3D auditorium sightline and booking controls.
